TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == satangahan nu ulic == lucuwal ngatu ngatu-1 nayanay haki tu lalud, caayhen katakelal mulekal tu, sacacay sa muculi nu di kudan nu niyadu' a dadan, bangsi ku sanek nu lutuk a bali. kemeten ku mata layaphan ku tusaay a , heluphan ku hanhan, kasenun pacekil ku ingay, ahemaw ku udiudipan. i dadan masuni ku dadayday atu ayam, sacabayan aku muculi tina dadan. u kuku'nu cilal paylaed nu papah nu kilang, pacilu' tu dadan atu waku. ngatu-2 cumudibawmi nu luma', masapinangdihan ku sacacaycacay nu lesing i papah nu kilang, salama hanaku kya ipapahay sabelabelat sananay a lising, patikutiku sa, masuped malatabakiyay a tesi', mahetik i lala'. ngatu-3 u demiad tu lalud caledes, u lutuk, u kilang atu lala' malahud nu akuti', mabadi' ku papah tawki' sa. talabi, u lesing i tatahekalan nida kya sudat sa, kanutekan tu kya, malawpes. hanca adiding ku lesing, apuyu kaidaw, nika mapananum nida ku mulangaway, mudaang aca ku iluc, patelek ku langaw, u aidan nu tahek atu udan cinida tu sakaudip. ngatu-4 ulesing! u labi idaw cinida pacabay, mulalemed tu lala', paudip tu i lalaay, muwacsa ku cilal yada tu, apuyu' ku tuki, nika yadah ku nipaya titanan. madihkaku misengi cinidaan, apuyu' kaudip misapelyang, yamapuda'ay a likat aku, itida i kakaydihan a pacilu', mapacilu' tu amin ku i cuwacuwaay.
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan nu ur~…ĺi ¶ == r~…ĺu ¶uwar~…ĺ Ňčatu Ňčatu-* najanaj ńßaki tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, ¶aajńß…ôn katak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu, sa ¶a ¶aj sa mu ¶ur~…ĺi nu di kudan nu nijadu Ē~ ° a dadan, baŇčsi ku san…ôk nu r~…ĺutuk a bar~…ĺi. k…ôm…ôt…ôn ku mata r~…ĺajapńßan ku tusaaj a , ńß…ôr~…ĺupńßan ku ńßanńßan, kas…ônun pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ ku iŇčaj, ańß…ômaw ku udiudipan. i dadan masuni ku dadajdaj atu ajam, sa ¶abajan aku mu ¶ur~…ĺi tina dadan. u kuku Ē~ °nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ pajr~…ĺa…ôd nu papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč, pa ¶ir~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu dadan atu waku. Ňčatu-* ¶umudibawmi nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, masapinaŇčdińßan ku sa ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč i papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč, sar~…ĺama ńßanaku kja ipapańßaj sab…ôr~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺat sananaj a r~…ĺisiŇč, patikutiku sa, masup…ôd mar~…ĺatabakijaj a t…ôsi Ē~ °, mańß…ôtik i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. Ňčatu-* u d…ômiad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, u r~…ĺutuk, u kir~…ĺaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mar~…ĺańßud nu akuti Ē~ °, mabadi Ē~ ° ku papańß tawki Ē~ ° sa. tar~…ĺabi, u r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč i tatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida kja sudat sa, kanut…ôkan tu kja, mar~…ĺawp…ôs. ńßan ¶a adidiŇč ku r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč, apuju kaidaw, nika mapananum nida ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, mudaaŇč a ¶a ku ir~…ĺu ¶, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, u aidan nu tańß…ôk atu udan ¶inida tu sakaudip. Ňčatu-* ur~…ĺ…ôsiŇč! u r~…ĺabi idaw ¶inida pa ¶abaj, mur~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, paudip tu i r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj, muwa ¶sa ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ jada tu, apuju Ē~ ° ku tuki, nika jadańß ku nipaja titanan. madińßkaku mis…ôŇči ¶inidaan, apuju Ē~ ° kaudip misap…ôr~…ĺjaŇč, jamapuda Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺikat aku, itida i kakajdińßan a pa ¶ir~…ĺu Ē~ °, mapa ¶ir~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu amin ku i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj.
S.FORM: == satangahan nu ulic == lucuwal ngatu ngatu-1 nayanay haki tu lalud, caayhen katakelal mulekal tu, sacacay sa muculi nu di kudan nu niyadu' a dadan, bangsi ku sanek nu lutuk a bali. kemeten ku mata layaphan ku tusaay a , heluphan ku hanhan, kasenun pacekil ku ingay, ahemaw ku udiudipan. i dadan masuni ku dadayday atu ayam, sacabayan aku muculi tina dadan. u kuku'nu cilal paylaed nu papah nu kilang, pacilu' tu dadan atu waku. ngatu-2 cumudibawmi nu luma', masapinangdihan ku sacacaycacay nu lesing i papah nu kilang, salama hanaku kya ipapahay sabelabelat sananay a lising, patikutiku sa, masuped malatabakiyay a tesi', mahetik i lala'. ngatu-3 u demiad tu lalud caledes, u lutuk, u kilang atu lala' malahud nu akuti', mabadi' ku papah tawki' sa. talabi, u lesing i tatahekalan nida kya sudat sa, kanutekan tu kya, malawpes. hanca adiding ku lesing, apuyu kaidaw, nika mapananum nida ku mulangaway, mudaang aca ku iluc, patelek ku langaw, u aidan nu tahek atu udan cinida tu sakaudip. ngatu-4 ulesing! u labi idaw cinida pacabay, mulalemed tu lala', paudip tu i lalaay, muwacsa ku cilal yada tu, apuyu' ku tuki, nika yadah ku nipaya titanan. madihkaku misengi cinidaan, apuyu' kaudip misapelyang, yamapuda'ay a likat aku, itida i kakaydihan a pacilu', mapacilu' tu amin ku i cuwacuwaay.
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan nu ur~…ĺi ¶ == r~…ĺu ¶uwar~…ĺ Ňčatu Ňčatu-* najanaj ńßaki tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, ¶aajńß…ôn katak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu, sa ¶a ¶aj sa mu ¶ur~…ĺi nu di kudan nu nijadu Ē~ ° a dadan, baŇčsi ku san…ôk nu r~…ĺutuk a bar~…ĺi. k…ôm…ôt…ôn ku mata r~…ĺajapńßan ku tusaaj a , ńß…ôr~…ĺupńßan ku ńßanńßan, kas…ônun pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ ku iŇčaj, ańß…ômaw ku udiudipan. i dadan masuni ku dadajdaj atu ajam, sa ¶abajan aku mu ¶ur~…ĺi tina dadan. u kuku Ē~ °nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ pajr~…ĺa…ôd nu papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč, pa ¶ir~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu dadan atu waku. Ňčatu-* ¶umudibawmi nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, masapinaŇčdińßan ku sa ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč i papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč, sar~…ĺama ńßanaku kja ipapańßaj sab…ôr~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺat sananaj a r~…ĺisiŇč, patikutiku sa, masup…ôd mar~…ĺatabakijaj a t…ôsi Ē~ °, mańß…ôtik i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. Ňčatu-* u d…ômiad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, u r~…ĺutuk, u kir~…ĺaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mar~…ĺańßud nu akuti Ē~ °, mabadi Ē~ ° ku papańß tawki Ē~ ° sa. tar~…ĺabi, u r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč i tatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida kja sudat sa, kanut…ôkan tu kja, mar~…ĺawp…ôs. ńßan ¶a adidiŇč ku r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč, apuju kaidaw, nika mapananum nida ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, mudaaŇč a ¶a ku ir~…ĺu ¶, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, u aidan nu tańß…ôk atu udan ¶inida tu sakaudip. Ňčatu-* ur~…ĺ…ôsiŇč! u r~…ĺabi idaw ¶inida pa ¶abaj, mur~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, paudip tu i r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj, muwa ¶sa ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ jada tu, apuju Ē~ ° ku tuki, nika jadańß ku nipaja titanan. madińßkaku mis…ôŇči ¶inidaan, apuju Ē~ ° kaudip misap…ôr~…ĺjaŇč, jamapuda Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺikat aku, itida i kakajdińßan a pa ¶ir~…ĺu Ē~ °, mapa ¶ir~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu amin ku i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj.
